core_philosophy: Tactical Minimalism. High-energy, command-center focus for outdoor running. High-visibility 'Tactical' look utilizing deep obsidian backgrounds with electric kinetic triggers.

layout_modes.dashboard: Bento grid structure. Summary metrics use col-span-1 (or equivalent flex row layout). Primary data/progress rings use large dominant spans.
layout_modes.active_workout: Maximalist data focus. Center stage for pace and time. High contrast, large typography for quick glances while running.

cards.style: Flat background (bg-zinc-900), sharp 1px border (border-zinc-800), rounded-xl, no soft shadows. For premium plans, add a 1px border of primary color at 50% opacity (border-primary/50) with an inner glow.
cards.hover_state: Slight lift, border lightens to border-zinc-700.

buttons.primary: bg-primary rounded-full px-8 py-4 flex items-center justify-center. No shadow. Active state scales down (scale-95).
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-800 rounded-full px-8 py-4. text-white.
buttons.fab_workout: Massive circular CTA (h-20 w-20) pinned to the bottom center. bg-primary text-white border-4 border-black.

navigation.bottom_tab: Sticky bottom nav. bg-zinc-950/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-zinc-900. High contrast active icon color (primary), dormant icons (zinc-500).

data_visualization.progress_rings: Thick strokes (strokeWidth 12-16). Track color zinc-800, Fill color primary (#FF3B30). Flat ends, no rounded caps for a harsher, tactical look.
data_visualization.bar_charts: Weekly progress bars: straight edges, minimal spacing. bg-zinc-800 for empty, bg-white for completed, bg-primary for today.

forms.inputs: bg-zinc-900 border-b-2 border-transparent border-b-zinc-800 rounded-t-lg px-4 py-4 text-white focus:border-b-primary focus:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors

animations.active_workout_timer: Monospaced tabular numbers. No bouncing or layout shifts.

image_urls.description: Close up of Nike running shoes on black concrete. Perfect for a moody, energetic first impression.
Runner's legs in motion on pavement. Use as header background for the training plans list with a heavy dark overlay.
A person running on a paved path through a forest. Represents pushing boundaries and elite training.

instructions_to_main_agent: Since this is a React Native Expo / mobile app context, translate the Tailwind utility references (which map perfectly via NativeWind) or apply them as standard React Native StyleSheets. Emphasize large touch targets, a 'tactical minimal' UI (no soft shadows, use 1px hard borders instead), and bold uppercase typography for metrics to ensure readability while the user is actively running. Build the layout with a sticky bottom tab bar for global navigation, and ensure the Active Workout screen uses massive tabular typography.
